data.content: Approved and shipped reload repo persistence hardening. UrlStateSync now rewrites the URL from persisted localStorage repo even if the store already matches, and a regression test locks that behavior. Validation: bun run lint (warnings only), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test all passed. bun run build fails on baseline main and this branch with an existing prerender error in src/components/providers.tsx during /beats and /_not-found, so this change does not introduce the build failure.
